task_objective: Align the typography of the 'Last Operation' field label and message content with the 'Status' field in the QAM panel by wrapping the label in CompactFieldLabel and specifying font-size: 12px for the row styling.
design_decisions: Wrap the 'Last Operation' label in CompactFieldLabel to reduce its font-size to 13px (matching 'Status').
Add font-size: 12px; to the .sdh-ludusavi-last-operation-row styling class to ensure its message content matches the 12px font size of the 'Status' message.
results: All tests and quality checks passed successfully, including typescript checking and ruff linting.
